images.title: CHM Monta Beach 1 4957RC.JPG
images.description: CHM-Montalivet (naturist resort) (CHM for "Centre Hélio-Marin", "center of sun and sea") is the world's first naturist holiday resort located south of Montalivet, in Vendays-Montalivet, France. The site contains an area of protected dunes that open onto the long Aquitaine beach and the Atlantic Ocean.

images.title: Monta Beach Sunset 5033.JPG
images.description:
CHM-Montalivet (naturist resort) (CHM for "Centre Hélio-Marin", "center of sun and sea") is the world's first naturist holiday resort located south of Montalivet, in Vendays-Montalivet, France. At sunset, many people fly kites on the beach, others try to photograph one of spectacular sunsets over the Atlantic Ocean.

Dune protections measures
